member_long_descriptions: Partial, edge-cropped dark brown leather couch showing a padded armrest/console and adjacent two-seat cushions with vertical seamed stitching and a slight glossy worn finish; a small remote or device sits on the armrest and a wooden side table is visible at the lower right—approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

Circular wall clock with a dark glossy scalloped frame and white face showing black Roman numerals and black hour/minute hands; glass-covered dial, slightly blurred/pixelated in the image, fully visible and intact — estimated diameter ~30–35 cm and photographed from about 1.5 m away.

Small dark-brown wooden side table with a turned leg and rounded tabletop visible in the crop; top holds stacked books and a draped cloth, base shows scuffs and wear; object is partially edge-cropped and occluded by items, and appears close to the camera (estimated ~0.8 m away).

Partial white metal wire pantry shelving with multiple horizontal tiers holding assorted packaged food, containers, and jars; visible through a doorway at the right edge of the crop and cut off by the image border, with some areas slightly blurred — approximate distance from camera ~1.5 m.

Close-up of a dark brown wooden side table with a rectangular top and turned legs, visible lower shelf holding a woven basketlike object; wood finish looks scuffed/worn and the right side is edge-cropped in the image; appears approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial crop showing the corner of a dark-stained wooden side table: rectangular top edge and a molded square leg are visible, with worn/scuffed finish on the top; object is close to the camera and cut off by the image edge (approx. 0.6 m away).

Edge-cropped dark brown wooden side table with a rectangular top and thick square legs, scuffed/worn finish and visible clutter (books) on the tabletop; partial view shows underside and one leg, likely a low-height table approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Dark brown wooden side table with a glossy rectangular top, carved curved apron and visible turned leg; surface holds a woven basket and small plate, and the table is partially edge-cropped in the image (approx. 1.0 m from camera).

Long dark brown leather three-seat couch with glossy, slightly worn upholstery, prominent stitched seams and segmented padded cushions; padded back/headrest sections visible and the right arm/edge is cropped — appears about 2.0 meters from the camera.

Dark black leather two-seat reclining couch with segmented padded cushions, stitched seams and high headrests; glossy faux-leather texture, visible right-arm cupholder/storage and floor-level base; mostly visible but slightly left-edge cropped in the image; estimated distance from camera ~2.0 m.
Partial, edge-cropped small dark-brown wooden side table with turned/lathe-turned legs and a low stretcher shelf; traditional style, polished finish, appears close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m away).

Partial view of a dark gray/black painted fireplace showing a rectangular recessed firebox with stepped/molded surround; the interior is shadowed black and the lower left edge is occluded by a nearby tabletop — approximate distance ~1.5 m from camera.

Close-up partial view of a dark brown leather couch showing the armrest and adjacent seat cushion with shiny, creased and worn surface, visible seams and plush padding; image is edge-cropped and the couch appears about 0.6 m from the camera.

White painted wooden mantel with rectangular recessed panels and decorative trim surrounding a dark charcoal/black fireplace insert and empty firebox; the right side and top are slightly edge-cropped and the foreground shows tabletop objects partially obscuring the lower corner — approximate distance ~1.5 m from camera.

Frontal stainless-steel over-the-range microwave with a large rectangular glass door framed by black trim, two interior lights visible through the window, and a vertical right-side digital control panel; reflective metal finish, slight low-resolution blur, and minor edge cropping at the image sides — estimated ~0.8 m from the camera.

Pair of dark brown recessed-panel wooden cabinet doors with a central vertical seam, matte finish and visible wood grain; minor scuffing along the bottom rail is visible — close-range view, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and narrow molding, matte finish with slight surface wear; right side is cut off by the image edge revealing part of a stainless-steel appliance, object appears partial and photographed from approximately 1.0 m.

Dark-stained wooden (or wood-veneered) cabinet door with a recessed central panel and vertical rectangular profile, matte finish with faint wood grain and a minor scuff near the bottom; door fills most of the crop and is slightly edge-cropped on the sides — estimated ~0.8 m from the camera.

Close-up partial crop of a couch showing a dark brown leather armrest at the lower left and a light gray-and-white striped fabric cushion or throw draped over the top; fabric appears wrinkled and textured, the object is edge-cropped and very close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m).

Partial/edge-cropped view of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet front or top panel, horizontal rectangular face with a slightly recessed center and darker surrounding frame, matte/underlit finish with faint surface wear and discoloration; appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m away).

Close-up of a black glossy stovetop/cooktop showing a horizontal row of chrome control knobs and stainless/chrome trim; reflective surface with slight blur and compression artifacts, partially edge-cropped at top and bottom, estimated ~0.6 m from camera.

Partial, edge-cropped corner of a dark inset sink basin recessed into a light-colored tiled countertop with visible grout lines; the rim and shadowed interior are visible (appears metallic or glazed), only a small portion of the basin is shown — estimated distance from camera ~0.7 m.

Full-height stainless-steel side-by-side refrigerator with reflective, slightly dented/smudged finish, vertical black recessed handles and a black water/ice dispenser on the left door; small brand badge visible at the top-right; approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.

Tall dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and simple frame, smooth semi-gloss finish with subtle vertical wood grain and no visible hardware; lower edge of the cabinet is cropped in the image and the object appears approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

Tall, dark-brown wooden cabinet with a recessed door panel and visible vertical edge/seam; the right side of the cabinet is cut off by the crop so the object is partially shown, with a satin finish and slight surface wear visible — appears photographed from about 1.0 m away.

Partial, edge-cropped silver/gray metal drip-style coffee maker with a cylindrical upper reservoir and a visible glass carafe seated in a black plastic base; dark handle and some surface blur are visible and the countertop-sized unit appears roughly 0.5 m from the camera.

Partial lower cabinet door of painted beige wood with a recessed panel and a short curved metal pull mounted near the top under a countertop; left edge of the door is cropped by the image frame, surface shows light gloss reflections and minor scuffs; approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark-stained wooden kitchen cabinet front beneath a stone-look countertop with a stainless sink visible; shows a raised-panel door and horizontal top rail with some scuffs and shadowing, photographed close-up (approx. 0.6 m from camera).

Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular central panel and vertical wood grain, matte finish with light surface wear; image is slightly edge-cropped and the door fills most of the frame, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Close-up of a beige, speckled stone or laminate table surface with granular brown and tan flecks and a slight glossy reflection; the surface is edge-cropped in the foreground and background and holds a small crumpled red-and-green object on a white paper, approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

Front-facing rectangular cabinet door made of dark-stained wood with a recessed central panel and visible vertical wood grain; matte finish with a small light reflection near the upper-left, no hardware or knobs visible, largely fully visible within the crop and approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Compact black glossy single-serve coffee maker with a chrome-accented lid and a translucent blue water-reservoir panel visible on the front; sits on a small drip tray, mostly visible but slightly cropped at the image edges, approximately 0.7 m from the camera.

A tall dark-brown wooden cabinet/closet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and subtle vertical wood grain; matte finish with light scuffing and a slight central sheen, no visible hardware, and the left edge of the door is slightly cropped by the image border. Estimated distance from camera ~1.2 m.

Polished stainless-steel rectangular sink basin with a reflective interior showing distorted reflections, partially cropped at the right/foreground edges and set into a beige-brown stone countertop; a faucet spout is visible at the top-right edge and the basin shows small water residue — photograph appears to be a close-up from about 0.6 m.

Frontal view of a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a raised rectangular center panel, matte finish and subtle surface wear; the top rail and a narrow gap are visible and the right edge appears slightly cropped — estimated distance from camera ~0.8 m.

Partial, edge-cropped dark mahogany wooden cabinet front showing an upper drawer with a metal knob and carved lower panel, glossy finish with visible scuffs and wear; appears close to the camera (≈0.8 m).

Partial, edge-cropped glossy black toaster front with a highly reflective curved/rounded metallic surface showing blurred reflections and specular highlights; appears close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m) and lower/side portions are cut off.

Partial, front-facing stainless steel two-slot toaster with reflective metal body and visible top slots and control area; edge-cropped in the image and slightly blurred—appears countertop-sized roughly 0.5 m from the camera.

Close-up of a full-height dark brown wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular central panel and narrow outer frame; vertical wood grain is visible, finish is low-sheen with minor scuffs and light reflections along the edges, photographed at roughly 1.0 m distance.

Partial view of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with raised rectangular panels and visible wood grain, cut off at the right edge of the crop and sitting adjacent to a light granite countertop; appears close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m).

Partial close-up of a dark brown glossy leather recliner couch showing a padded headrest, visible stitched seams and a wide padded armrest with a rectangular inset (possible control or cupholder); the seat and arm are edge-cropped and show creasing/wear in the leather — appears roughly 1.0 m from the camera.

Circular wall clock with a white dial and black Roman numerals, black hour and minute hands, set in a dark glossy scalloped frame (likely wood or metal); fully visible in crop but slightly blurred/low-resolution with minor glare on the glass; estimated about 1.5 meters from the camera.

Dark brown wooden side table with a turned central leg and a visible lower shelf holding stacked items; top surface with magazines is visible at the left, the right side of the table is edge-cropped in the image, and the object appears relatively close to the camera (approx. 1.2 m).

Partial vertical crop of a white/chrome metal wire pantry shelf with three to four visible tiers holding assorted boxed and jarred food items and containers; shelf is edge-cropped at the image border and slightly blurred — estimated ~1.2 meters from the camera.

Close-up of a dark-stained wooden side table showing the apron and a turned leg; the object is partial and edge-cropped in the frame with visible wood grain and scuffed/worn finish on the corner, estimated about 0.6–0.8 meters from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark brown wooden side table seen close-up with a rectangular top visible at the upper left, two vertical square legs and a lower shelf cluttered with papers/boxes; surface appears worn and the piece is occluded by items (approx. 0.7 m from camera).

Dark brown wooden two-tier side table with a rectangular top and lower shelf, holding a potted green plant and a small stack of magazines/papers; surface appears cluttered and the table is partially cut off at the crop edge (approx. 1.0 m from camera).

Partial right-edge crop of a small dark brown polished wooden side table with a rectangular top, carved decorative apron and turned legs, glossy finish and intact condition; tabletop holds a small plate and lamp base — estimated distance ~0.6 m from camera.

Light wood rectangular wall-mounted picture frame with glass and an off-white mat holding a printed document or poster showing blue and black text/graphics; full front view visible (not cropped) with slight reflection on the glass, photographed from approximately 0.8 m away.

Dark brown leather three-seat reclining couch with segmented, heavily padded cushions and visible stitched seams and creasing; right-side arm/edge is slightly cut off by the image border, and the couch appears close to the camera (approximately 1.5 meters away).

Two-seat dark brown/black leather reclining loveseat with padded, segmented backrests and visible stitched seams; right armrest includes a console/cup-holder, upholstery has a slight glossy sheen, left side is slightly edge-cropped in the image; object appears about 2.0 m from the camera.

Low, light-beige wooden side table with a rectangular top and a lower shelf (two-tier), varnished surface with slight wear/staining visible; the right side of the table is edge-cropped/partially cut off in the image; appears to be a small, low piece of furniture about 1.2 m from the camera.

Dark, rectangular wall-mounted picture frame with a glossy reflective glass front showing specular glare and reflections; left edge of the frame is partially cut off in the crop and the photo appears taken from about 1.5 meters away.

Partial view of a dark gray painted fireplace surround with stepped rectangular molding and a deep black, unlit opening; surround appears matte-painted (likely wood or plaster) and is close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).

Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark brown glossy leather couch showing the armrest and adjacent seat cushion with visible wrinkles, creases and slight sagging; appears worn and close to the camera (approx. 1.0 m).

White painted wooden mantel with rectangular recessed panels and molded trim framing a black metal firebox insert with a stepped inner surround; hearth interior appears dark/empty, the crop is partially edge‑cropped and includes foreground decorative objects — estimated distance to camera ~1.5 meters.

Partial crop showing a cream/off-white fabric lampshade with a scalloped rim and decorative trim/fringe; cone-shaped shade sits above a small table-lamp base that is partly visible at the lower right, cut off by the image edge — appears close to the camera (≈0.6 m).

Stainless-steel over-the-range microwave with a wide rectangular tinted glass door showing internal metal mesh and two interior lights, vertical right-side control panel with digital display and buttons; brushed metal surface with reflections and slight smudging, seen from about 0.8 meters away (frontal view, minor edge crop at image border).

Dark brown wooden cabinet showing two recessed-panel doors with a narrow vertical seam at center, visible wood grain and matte finish, small scuffs along the bottom edge, no visible handles; photographed close-up at roughly 1.0 m under low lighting and shown full-height within the crop.

Large dark brown/espresso recessed-panel wooden cabinet door with raised trim and a matte finish, occupying most of the crop; vertically oriented and edge-cropped on the right (adjacent stainless appliance) and slightly on the left, with minor surface smudging and no visible hardware, estimated ~1.0 m from the camera.

Vertical, dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and narrow side trim; surface shows subtle wood grain and a matte-to-semi-gloss finish, small scuff near the bottom edge, and the image is edge-cropped at the left and right — estimated ~0.8 m from camera.

Close-up of a partial, edge-cropped brown couch cushion or arm with glossy, slightly wrinkled fabric upholstery, visible seam and reflective highlights; lower area appears darker and the object is photographed very close to the camera (approx. 0.5 m).

Partial close-up of a dark brown wooden cabinet showing the top edge and a flat rectangular front/top panel with a low-sheen veneer and minor wear; image is edge-cropped and under low light, estimated distance ~0.8 m from camera.

Partial close-up of a black glossy stovetop control panel approximately 0.6 m from the camera, showing three stainless steel round knobs on a reflective metal strip with a beige countertop visible along the bottom; the object is edge-cropped horizontally and shows strong reflections on the surface.

Partial, edge-cropped white glazed ceramic sink rim with a dark triangular basin interior visible toward the upper-left of the crop, sitting against a light speckled beige countertop; object appears close to the camera (approx. 0.5–0.7 m).

Close-up of a black enameled gas stove top with stainless-steel back control panel and digital display; four metal burner grates and front-mounted control knobs are visible, surface shows slight glare and mild compression artifacts; camera approximately 0.6 m from the stove.

Front-facing stainless steel side-by-side refrigerator with two vertical doors, black vertical handles and a built-in water/ice dispenser on the left door; reflective finish shows horizontal reflection bands and minor surface irregularities, with slight edge cropping at the top/right — estimated distance about 1.5 m from the camera.

Tall, narrow dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and flat matte finish, shown mostly front-on but slightly edge-cropped at the left/top; no handles visible — appears to be approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel, vertical wood grain and a glossy finish that shows a circular light reflection near the upper-left; the door is mostly visible in the crop with a slight top-edge crop and no visible handle, approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Tall dark-brown wooden cabinet with a recessed rectangular door panel and a narrow vertical seam/handle; matte finish with a small surface blemish, appears partial and cut off at the right edge of the crop, photographed from approximately 1.0 m away.

Partial/edge-cropped medium-brown stained wooden cabinet door with visible wood grain and a recessed raised-panel profile, small round metal knob near the upper right, glossy finish with light wear; appears to be a lower kitchen cabinet under a countertop and is photographed from close range (approx. 0.8 m).

Tall, narrow dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed central panel and simple molded border; surface has a low-gloss sheen with minor scuffs and wear, and the top and bottom are slightly cropped in the image; appears to be about 0.7 m from the camera.

Dark brown wooden recessed-panel cabinet door with a raised frame and visible wood grain; matte, slightly worn finish with no obvious handle and a small darker recess at the top; image shows the door photographed from close range and appears slightly edge-cropped on the right (approx. 0.6 m away).

Silver/gray metal drip-style coffee maker with a black base and a visible glass carafe; object is slightly blurred, edge-cropped on the left, and appears to be a small countertop unit approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial close-up of a dark brown wooden base cabinet with recessed vertical paneling and a slightly worn top edge under a countertop with a visible stainless-steel sink; image is edge-cropped and appears taken at close range (~0.6 m).

Tall, narrow dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular center panel, visible vertical wood grain and low sheen; the full door is visible (not cropped) in the image, and the camera appears to be approximately 1.5 m away.

Close-up of a dark brown stained wooden base cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and a narrow top drawer lip; matte finish with slight scuffing near the bottom edge, no visible hardware, and the door fills most of the crop (approx. 0.6 m from camera).

Partial view of a dark brown stained wooden base cabinet door with a recessed central panel and rectangular molding; edge-cropped by the image on the right and sitting next to a light speckled granite countertop, appearing close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m).

Small black glossy single-serve coffee maker (pod-style) with a vertical blue translucent water reservoir/window, top hinged lid and silver accents; the base is partly cropped at the bottom of the image and the unit appears to be a compact countertop appliance approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

Close-up of a dark brown wooden cabinet front or drawer panel showing horizontal wood grain and a slightly glossy, worn finish; top and bottom edges are cropped in the image, estimated ~0.6 m from the camera.

Partial vertical crop of a dark reddish-brown wooden cabinet with glossy finish, raised carved panels and molding, a small upper drawer with a round metal knob and a decorative base plinth; object is edge-cropped and photographed from close range (≈0.8 m).

Partial rectangular stainless-steel inset sink with a reflective, slightly wet basin showing blue-white reflections; set into a mottled brown stone countertop and cropped by the image edges, photographed at close range (approx. 0.6 m).

Close-up of a small stainless-steel two-slot tabletop toaster with reflective chrome finish and visible top slot openings; the appliance is partially cut off by the crop edge, shows surface reflections and slight smudging, and appears photographed at close range (~0.6 meters).

Partial close-up of a curved, glossy black/chrome toaster top with strong specular highlights and blurry environmental reflections; rounded metal surface appears edge-cropped in the frame and is approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark-stained wooden cabinet door with vertical recessed panels and visible wood grain and a slightly glossy finish; lower section near the floor is visible and the door shows minor wear—appears close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m).

Partial, edge-cropped green upholstered chair seat visible at the bottom of the crop with fabric texture and a curved front edge; backrest is not visible, object appears close to the camera (approx. 0.5 m).
clusters.representative_description: Tall dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and simple frame, smooth semi-gloss finish with subtle vertical wood grain and no visible hardware; lower edge of the cabinet is cropped in the image and the object appears approximately 1.2 m from the camera.
